metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4116
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig S1B: Subcellular distribution pattern of TFR was similar to other synaptic proteins suggesting synaptic location.
Fig1A-D: Immunofluorescence staining in hippocampal neurons showed that TFR largely co-localized with the postsynaptic marker PSD95 but rarely with pre-synaptic protein synaptophysin and partially co-localized with AMPA receptor subunits GluR1 and GluR2.
Fig1E: Quantification of the colocalisation index shows higher colocalisation of TFR with postsynaptic marker PSD95 compared to presynaptic marker synaptophysin.
Fig1G: TFR KO hippocampal neurons demonstrate an ablation of the anti-TFR signal indicating specificity of the antibody.. Experimental description: The hippocampal culture was derived from E14.5-E18.5 mice embryos.

antibody:
TFR (mAb, Invitrogen)
Genotype was determined by PCR with TFR (Forward 5'-CAGTAATCCCAGAGGAATCATTAG-3' and Reverse 5'-CTAAACCGGGTGTATGACAATG-3') primers. nucleotide BLAST of the latter confirms this is NM_001357298 gene=Tfrc
